steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Butler “broke into the field” with publications and won a MacArthur Fellowship, demonstrating her concrete success at gaining entry to science fiction.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
”Impenetrable” means impossible to enter or get through—a quality her actual success directly contradicts, so she clearly did not view the genre this way.

The other three don't describe barriers to entry and don't align with the contrast between demographic dominance and her demonstrated access.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
